description: The Sixth Family is a term used to describe a crime family or criminal organization, usually Italian-American or Italian-Canadian, that has become powerful enough to rival the Five Families of the New York City Mafia. Various groups have been deemed the Sixth Family, including the Rizzuto crime family, DeCavalcante crime family, East Harlem Purple Gang, Gallo crew, and Rudaj Organization. The term is not a specific organization but a designation applied by the press or underworld.
